.mvn/wrapper/maven-wrapper.properties.general_idea: Upgrade the Maven distribution version from 3.8.1 to 3.9.4 to ensure compatibility with JDK 21.
.mvn/wrapper/maven-wrapper.properties.why_exists: Maven 3.8.1 may have compatibility issues or lack support for features required by JDK 21; upgrading ensures the build toolchain runs correctly on the target JDK.

.mvn/wrapper/maven-wrapper.properties.general_idea: Upgrade the Maven Wrapper JAR version from 0.5.6 to 3.2.0 and update its repository path.
.mvn/wrapper/maven-wrapper.properties.why_exists: Older wrapper versions may not support the newer Maven distribution or JDK 21 environment correctly; upgrading ensures the wrapper script functions properly.

.mvn/wrapper/maven-wrapper.properties.general_idea: Add Apache License header to the maven-wrapper.properties file.
.mvn/wrapper/maven-wrapper.properties.after:

mvnw.cmd.general_idea: Upgrade the Maven Wrapper version from 0.5.6 to 3.1.0 to align with newer Maven standards.
Update the fallback download URL to use the new Maven Wrapper group ID and version.
Switch from FOR /F "tokens=1,2 delims==" to FOR /F "usebackq tokens=1,2 delims==" for robust property parsing.
Change mavenrc script lookup from %HOME% to %USERPROFILE% for better Windows compatibility.
Pass CLI arguments to pre-scripts to ensure they receive the same arguments as the main command.
Remove quotes from MAVEN_SKIP_RC comparison to fix potential string matching issues.
Remove quotes from MAVEN_BATCH_PAUSE comparison to fix potential string matching issues.
Remove quotes from MAVEN_TERMINATE_CMD comparison to fix potential string matching issues.
Use cmd /C exit /B instead of exit /B to ensure proper exit code propagation in Windows.
Format the Java execution command with line continuations for better readability.

mvnw.general_idea: Update Apache License URL from HTTPS to HTTP in the Maven Wrapper script header.
Add support for loading /usr/local/etc/mavenrc configuration file in the Maven Wrapper script.
Fix whitespace in Apple developer documentation URL comment.
Update Java command detection to use `command -v` instead of `which` for better POSIX compliance and shell compatibility.
Upgrade Maven Wrapper JAR version from 0.5.6 (Takari) to 3.1.0 (Apache) and update download URLs.
Add error handling to remove partial download files if wget fails.
Remove trailing whitespace in the curl download section.
Add MAVEN_DEBUG_OPTS variable to the Java execution command in the Maven Wrapper.
Reformat the exec command arguments for better readability by splitting long lines.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to a release compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.5.5 does not support Java 21; the build will fail or runtime errors will occur due to unsupported bytecode version or missing JDK 21 support in the framework.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version property to 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project must compile against Java 21 APIs and bytecode; keeping it at 17 would prevent using new JDK 21 features or cause compatibility issues with dependencies requiring JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove the explicit QueryDSL version property.
Add Guava library as a new dependency.
